parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam BoxPadding 10
skinparam ParticipantPadding 20

box "Temperature Sensor A internal sequence" #E2E2E2
participant "**Internal Sequence**" as IS
participant "getSignal" as GS
participant "AD conversion" as ADC
participant "signal processing" as SP
end box

activate IS
IS -> GS : start
activate GS
GS -> ADC
activate ADC
ADC -> SP
activate SP
SP --> ADC
deactivate SP
ADC --> GS
deactivate ADC
GS --> IS : end
deactivate GS
deactivate IS

@enduml
```
